name: memorydetective
description: iOS leak hunting + performance investigation. Reads .memgraph and .trace files, classifies retain cycles against a 36-pattern catalog (SwiftUI / Combine / Concurrency / UIKit / Core Animation / Core Data / SwiftData / Coordinator / RxSwift / Realm). v1.17 reliability pass: strtobool env var truthy parsing across all MEMORYDETECTIVE_* flags, verifyFix whitelist accepts exact / substring / regex match modes, Instruments.app AppleScript document query catches traces saved outside watchDir, inspectTrace fault-tolerant fallback on wedged 52K bundles, configurable countAlive framework-noise filter. v1.16 unblocked trace recording on macOS 26.x via recordViaInstrumentsApp (41st MCP tool, wraps the Instruments.app GUI since xcrun xctrace record is broken on this OS). v1.15 added analyzeMemoryFootprint, analyzeEnergyImpact, analyzeLeakTimeline. v1.13 shipped summarizeTrace. Bridges to Swift source via SourceKit-LSP. 41 MCP tools, 34 catalog resources, 6 investigation prompts.
